I tried using priority=1 but that's invalid - need to check what valid values are.
Looking at the notify_user tool definition, it accepts: type (info/success/warning/error/progress), priority (no range specified but 1 was rejected), timeout.
Since I don't know the exact valid priority values, I'll omit the priority argument and just send with success type.
The task is complete - output file exists at /a0/usr/workdir/gmail-output.md.
